{"id":"project-LICHEN-nlic","title":"Timer wraparound bug in DAO manager edge expiration","description":"File: lichen/subsys/lichen/rpl/routing.c:688

The age calculation `uint32_t age = now - e->last_updated;` in `lichen_rpl_dao_manager_expire()` does not handle timestamp wraparound.

Third instance of the same pattern. After ~49.7 days runtime, parent edges may be incorrectly expired.

Impact: Routing table may become inconsistent after extended runtime.

Fix: All three age calculations (dodag.c:398, routing.c:654, routing.c:688) should use a wraparound-aware helper.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:51:20.629509Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:51:20.629542Z"}
